opinion.h2: OLIVE ELLA MARILLA HARDING, Plaintiff in Error, v. MYRTLE GILLETT et al. No. 910.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. J. C. Robberts and George W. Buckner for plaintiff in error.
Messrs. Arthur A. Birney and Henry F. Woodard for defendants in error.
Dismissed with costs on motion of counsel for the plaintiff in error.[ Harding v. Gillett (1910) ]
